data.content: Implementation review approved. Reviewed branch `knot/foolery-f02d` / commit `a1cbe5c33d64783f86cd63b4c001952afb1fd539` against `origin/main`. The diff matches the knot scope: one persisted interactive session timeout default in shared settings, explicit Settings > Defaults UI copy, shared runtime watchdog sourcing above the harness layer, setup/script support for the new defaults field, and test coverage for defaults, persistence, and shared interactive behavior. Sanity gates remain green on the review artifact: `bun run lint`, `bunx tsc --noEmit`, `bun run test`, and `bun run build`.
